item.title: K2's Space Satellite: 5 Ways It Supercharges AI Amid Tesla FSD Recall Chaos
item.description: Ever wondered how orbiting data centers could turbocharge AI right when Tesla's self-driving tech hits regulatory snags? Dive into K2's Gravitas satellite and its game-changing potential, plus how Alphabet's Anori is shaking up urban planning in this wild tech landscape.
